message:
Apply code formatting and add new page assets for sharing and routing

- Format code with consistent style (rustfmt)
- Add router.js and share.js page assets for enhanced navigation
- Add regex cache benchmark for performance testing
- Expand Cloudflare deployment with additional configuration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1 @@
-coding_agent_session_search-u4s7
+coding_agent_session_search-ka49

@@ -159,6 +159,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "cache_micro"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "regex_cache"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "docs"
 path = "tests/docs/mod.rs"
